23: module apb_node
24:   #(
25:     parameter NB_MASTER = 8,
26:     parameter APB_DATA_WIDTH = 32,
27:     parameter APB_ADDR_WIDTH = 32
28:     )
29:    (
30: 
31:     // SLAVE PORT
32:     input  logic                                     penable_i,
33:     input  logic                                     pwrite_i,
34:     input  logic [31:0]                              paddr_i,
35:     input  logic [31:0]                              pwdata_i,
36:     output logic [31:0]                              prdata_o,
37:     output logic                                     pready_o,
38:     output logic                                     pslverr_o,
39: 
40:     // MASTER PORTS
41:     output logic [NB_MASTER-1:0]                     penable_o,
42:     output logic [NB_MASTER-1:0]                     pwrite_o,
43:     output logic [NB_MASTER-1:0][31:0]               paddr_o,
44:     output logic [NB_MASTER-1:0]                     psel_o,
45:     output logic [NB_MASTER-1:0][31:0]               pwdata_o,
46:     input  logic [NB_MASTER-1:0][31:0]               prdata_i,
47:     input  logic [NB_MASTER-1:0]                     pready_i,
48:     input  logic [NB_MASTER-1:0]                     pslverr_i,
49: 
50:     // CONFIGURATION PORT
51:     input  logic [NB_MASTER-1:0][APB_ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] START_ADDR_i,
52:     input  logic [NB_MASTER-1:0][APB_ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] END_ADDR_i
53: 
54:     );
55: 
56:    genvar                              i;
57:    integer                             s_loop1,s_loop2,s_loop3,s_loop4,s_loop5,s_loop6,s_loop7;
58: 
59:    // GENERATE SEL SIGNAL FOR MASTER MATCHING THE ADDRESS
60:    generate
61:       for(i=0;i<NB_MASTER;i++)
62:         begin
63:            assign psel_o[i]  =  (paddr_i >= START_ADDR_i[i]) && (paddr_i <= END_ADDR_i[i]);
64:         end
65:    endgenerate
66: 
67:    always_comb
68:      begin
69:         // PENABLE GENERATION
70:         for ( s_loop1 = 0; s_loop1 < NB_MASTER; s_loop1++ )
71:           begin
72:              if( psel_o[s_loop1] == 1'b1 )
73:                begin
74:                   penable_o[s_loop1] = penable_i;
75:                end
76:              else
77:                begin
78:                   penable_o[s_loop1] = '0;
79:                end
80:           end
81:      end
82:

23: module apb_node_wrap
24:   #(
25:     parameter NB_MASTER = 8,
26:     parameter APB_DATA_WIDTH = 32,
27:     parameter APB_ADDR_WIDTH = 32
28:     )
29:    (
30:     input logic                                      clk_i,
31:     input logic                                      rst_ni,
32: 
33:     // SLAVE PORT
34:     APB_BUS.Slave                                    apb_slave,
35: 
36:     // MASTER PORTS
37:     APB_BUS.Master                                   apb_masters[NB_MASTER-1:0],
38: 
39:     // CONFIGURATION PORT
40:     input  logic [NB_MASTER-1:0][APB_ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] start_addr_i,
41:     input  logic [NB_MASTER-1:0][APB_ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] end_addr_i
42:     );
43: 
44:    genvar                              i;
45: 
46:    logic [NB_MASTER-1:0]               penable;
47:    logic [NB_MASTER-1:0]               pwrite;
48:    logic [NB_MASTER-1:0][31:0]         paddr;
49:    logic [NB_MASTER-1:0]               psel;
50:    logic [NB_MASTER-1:0][31:0]         pwdata;
51:    logic [NB_MASTER-1:0][31:0]         prdata;
52:    logic [NB_MASTER-1:0]               pready;
53:    logic [NB_MASTER-1:0]               pslverr;
54: 
55:    // GENERATE SEL SIGNAL FOR MASTER MATCHING THE ADDRESS
56:    generate
57:       for(i=0;i<NB_MASTER;i++)
58:         begin
59:            assign apb_masters[i].penable = penable[i];
60:            assign apb_masters[i].pwrite  = pwrite[i];
61:            assign apb_masters[i].paddr   = paddr[i];
62:            assign apb_masters[i].psel    = psel[i];
63:            assign apb_masters[i].pwdata  = pwdata[i];
64:            assign prdata[i]              = apb_masters[i].prdata;
65:            assign pready[i]              = apb_masters[i].pready;
66:            assign pslverr[i]             = apb_masters[i].pslverr;
67:         end
68:    endgenerate
69: 
70:    apb_node

16: module apb_clkdiv
17: #(
18:     parameter APB_ADDR_WIDTH = 12  //APB slaves are 4KB by default
19: )
20: (
21:     input  logic                      HCLK,
22:     input  logic                      HRESETn,
23:     input  logic [APB_ADDR_WIDTH-1:0] PADDR,
24:     input  logic               [31:0] PWDATA,
25:     input  logic                      PWRITE,
26:     input  logic                      PSEL,
27:     input  logic                      PENABLE,
28:     output logic               [31:0] PRDATA,
29:     output logic                      PREADY,
30:     output logic                      PSLVERR,
31: 
32:     output logic                [7:0] clk_div0,
33:     output logic                      clk_div0_valid,
34:     output logic                [7:0] clk_div1,
35:     output logic                      clk_div1_valid,
36:     output logic                [7:0] clk_div2,
37:     output logic                      clk_div2_valid
38: 
39: );
40: 
41:    logic [7:0]                        r_clkdiv0;
42:    logic [7:0]                        r_clkdiv1;
43:    logic [7:0]                        r_clkdiv2;
44: 
45:    logic [1:0]                        s_apb_addr;
46: 
47:    assign s_apb_addr = PADDR[3:2];
48: 
49:    always @ (posedge HCLK or negedge HRESETn) begin
50:       if(~HRESETn) begin
51:          r_clkdiv0      = 'h0;
52:          r_clkdiv1      = 'h0;
53:          r_clkdiv2      = 8'h0A;
54:          clk_div0_valid = 1'b0;
55:          clk_div1_valid = 1'b0;
56:          clk_div2_valid = 1'b0;
57:       end
58:       else begin
59:          clk_div0_valid    = 1'b0;
60:          clk_div1_valid    = 1'b0;
61:          clk_div2_valid    = 1'b0;
62:          if (PSEL && PENABLE && PWRITE)
63:            begin
64:               case (s_apb_addr)
65:                 `REG_CLKDIV0:
66:                   begin
67:                      r_clkdiv0      = PWDATA[7:0];
68:                      clk_div0_valid = 1'b1;
69:                   end
70:                 `REG_CLKDIV1:
71:                   begin
72:                      r_clkdiv1      = PWDATA[7:0];
73:                      clk_div1_valid = 1'b1;
74:                   end
75:                 `REG_CLKDIV2:
76:                   begin
77:                      r_clkdiv2      = PWDATA[7:0];
78:                      clk_div2_valid = 1'b1;
79:                   end
80:               endcase
81:            end
82:       end
83:    end //always
84: 
85:    always_comb
86:      begin
87:         case (s_apb_addr)
88:           `REG_CLKDIV0:
89:             PRDATA = {24'h0,r_clkdiv0};
90:           `REG_CLKDIV1:
91:             PRDATA = {24'h0,r_clkdiv1};
92:           `REG_CLKDIV2:
93:             PRDATA = {24'h0,r_clkdiv2};
94:           default:
95:             PRDATA = '0;
96:         endcase
97:      end
98: 
99:    assign clk_div0 = r_clkdiv0;
100:    assign clk_div1 = r_clkdiv1;
101:    assign clk_div2 = r_clkdiv2;
102: 
103:    assign PREADY  = 1'b1;
104:    assign PSLVERR = 1'b0;
105: 
106: endmodule

100: 	s_write_counter_hi = 1'b0;
101: 	s_start_timer_lo   = 1'b0;
102: 	s_start_timer_hi   = 1'b0;
103: 	s_reset_timer_lo   = 1'b0;
104: 	s_reset_timer_hi   = 1'b0;
105: 
106: 	// APERIPH BUS: LOWER PRIORITY
107:         if (PSEL && PENABLE && PWRITE)

109:

111:

129:

131: 		 s_start_timer_lo   = 1'b1;
132: 
133: 	       `TIMER_START_HI:
134: 		 s_start_timer_hi   = 1'b1;
135: 
136: 	       `TIMER_RESET_LO:
137: 		 s_reset_timer_lo   = 1'b1;
138: 
139: 	       `TIMER_RESET_HI:
140: 		 s_reset_timer_hi   = 1'b1;
141: 
142:              endcase
143:           end
144: 
145: 	// INPUT EVENTS: HIGHER PRIORITY
146: 	if ( event_lo_i == 1 | s_start_timer_lo == 1 )
147: 	  s_cfg_lo[`ENABLE_BIT] = 1;
148: 	else
149: 	  begin
150: 	     if ( s_cfg_lo_reg[`MODE_64_BIT] == 1'b0 ) // 32 BIT MODE
151: 	       begin
152: 		  if ( ( s_cfg_lo[`ONE_SHOT_BIT] == 1'b1 ) && ( s_target_reached_lo == 1'b1 ) ) // ONE SHOT FEATURE: DISABLES TIMER ONCE THE TARGET IS REACHED
153: 		    s_cfg_lo[`ENABLE_BIT] = 0;
154: 	       end
155: 	     else
156: 	       begin
157: 		  if ( ( s_cfg_lo[`ONE_SHOT_BIT] == 1'b1 ) && ( s_timer_val_lo  == 32'hFFFFFFFF ) && ( s_target_reached_hi == 1'b1 ) ) // ONE SHOT FEATURE: DISABLES TIMER ONCE LOW COUNTER REACHES 0xFFFFFFFF and HI COUNTER TARGET IS REACHED
158: 		    s_cfg_lo[`ENABLE_BIT] = 0;
159: 	       end
160: 	  end
161: 
162: 	// INPUT EVENTS: HIGHER PRIORITY
163: 	if ( event_hi_i == 1 | s_start_timer_hi == 1 )
164: 	  s_cfg_hi[`ENABLE_BIT] = 1;
165: 	else

168: 	       s_cfg_hi[`ENABLE_BIT] = 0;
169: 	  end
170: 
171: 	// RESET LO
172: 	if (s_reset_count_lo == 1'b1)
173: 	  s_cfg_lo[`RESET_BIT] = 1'b0;
174: 
175: 	// RESET HI
176: 	if (s_reset_count_hi == 1'b1)
177: 	  s_cfg_hi[`RESET_BIT] = 1'b0;
178: 
179:      end

196: 	     s_timer_cmp_hi_reg <= s_timer_cmp_hi;
197:           end
198:      end

201:    assign PREADY  = PSEL & PENABLE;

206:

209:

215:                `CFG_REG_HI:
216:                  PRDATA = s_cfg_hi_reg;
217: 
218:                `TIMER_VAL_LO:
219:                  PRDATA = s_timer_val_lo;

229:
